# CoverClarity

CoverClarity is an independent Florida ACA subsidy estimate and Marketplace verification guide library. It is not affiliated with the U.S. government or HealthCare.gov. Content is estimate guidance only, not insurance, tax, or legal advice.

## Core URLs

- Home and calculator: https://coverclarityhealth.com/
- Blog library: https://coverclarityhealth.com/blog.html
- Methodology: https://coverclarityhealth.com/methodology.html
- Contact: https://coverclarityhealth.com/contact.html
- Editorial policy: https://coverclarityhealth.com/editorial-policy.html
- Sources and corrections: https://coverclarityhealth.com/sources-corrections.html
- Privacy policy: https://coverclarityhealth.com/privacy.html
- Sitemap: https://coverclarityhealth.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://coverclarityhealth.com/feed.xml
- Search index JSON: https://coverclarityhealth.com/content/search-index.json

## Guide Hubs

No guide hubs are indexable yet because the currently published articles have not opened those clusters.

## Priority Hub Articles

No priority hub articles are published yet. They will appear here when their scheduled publish times arrive.

## Content Notes

- Sitemap, RSS, and search index include currently published article URLs only.
- Future queued articles are generated with noindex,follow until their scheduled publish time.
- Priority hub articles include expanded summaries, five-question FAQ sections, and guide-path links as they publish.
- Guide hub pages are noindex until at least one article in that cluster is published.
- Canonical URLs use the https://coverclarityhealth.com placeholder until the production domain is assigned.
